The [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] '''Light Patrol Ship''' was used by the [[Sector Ranger/Legends|Sector Rangers]],<ref name="Pirates & Privateers 82" /> the [[Ringali Shell Security Force]]s,<ref name="The Far Orbit Project 70" /> as well as [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]].<ref name="Flashpoint! Brak Sector 80" />

==Characteristics==
The Light Patrol Ship had three decks, and was 38 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long. It carried 6 crew (including 3 [[Gunner/Legends|gunners]]), 8 [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]], 100 [[Metric ton/Legends|metric tons]] of cargo, and 1 [[Standard month/Legends|month's]] worth of [[Foodstuff/Legends|consumables]].<ref name="Pirates & Privateers 82" />

The ship could achieve 1,050 [[Kilometer per hour/Legends|km/h]] in atmosphere. It had a Class 1 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] and a Class 10 backup. The ship was [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielded]], with 3 [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] [[Turret/Legends|turrets]] (2 dorsal and 1 ventral) plus 2 forward twin laser cannons.
